summary: Privacy-friendly web analytics with realtime AI insights Discussion | Link
content: Reignat is a privacy-friendly web analytics platform for founders, startups, and indie makers who want clear insights without the complexity of Google Analytics. Track visitors, pageviews, traffic sources, devices, locations, funnels, and full visitor journeys in real time on a live 3D globe. Connect revenue to see which pages and channels actually earn. Ask the built-in AI assistant about your traffic in plain words and get answers with charts, all from one fast, modern dashboard.
chineseSummary: 具有实时人工智能见解的隐私友好型网络分析关联
chineseContent: Reignat 是一个隐私友好的网络分析平台，适合那些希望获得清晰的见解而无需使用 Google Analytics 的复杂性的创始人、初创公司和独立制作者。在实时 3D 地球上实时跟踪访客、页面浏览量、流量来源、设备、位置、渠道和完整访客旅程。连接收入以查看哪些页面和频道实际赚取收入。用简单的语言向内置人工智能助手询问您的流量，并通过图表获得答案，所有这些都可以通过一个快速、现代化的仪表板完成。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
